dag_id.description: Optional DAG to place this view into

edited_history_id.description: Required when updating the query field. Get this from latest_history_id on the retrieve response. Used for optimistic concurrency control.

folder_id.description: Optional folder ID used to organize this view in the SQL editor sidebar.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this data warehouse saved query.

is_test.description: Whether this view is for testing only and will auto-expire.

name.description: Unique name for the view. Used as the table name in HogQL queries. Must not conflict with existing table names.

query.description: HogQL query definition as a JSON object. Must contain a "query" key with the SQL string. Example: {"query": "SELECT * FROM events LIMIT 100"}
